body_txt: When someone is on the hunt for a missing person but finds out that the person is no longer alive—either recently deceased or long dead. Often a result of realizing that someone is Never a Runaway . This usually comes as a surprise, but if someone has been missing for a very long time, there may be doubts whether they are still alive , and finding the corpse merely proves those suspicions . Usually overlaps with Late to the Tragedy . Tragic when it involved Searching for the Lost Relative . Contrast Never Found the Body , where the presumed dead is really missing.
